movie.actors: Dennis Quaid, Jake Gyllenhaal, Emmy Rossum, Dash Mihok
movie.awards: Won 1 BAFTA Film Award. Another 5 wins & 12 nominations.
movie.plot: Jack Hall, paleoclimatologist, must make a daring trek from Washington, D.C. to New York City, to reach his son, trapped in the cross-hairs of a sudden international storm which plunges the planet into a new Ice Age.
movie.title: The Day After Tomorrow
movie.writer: Roland Emmerich (story), Roland Emmerich (screenplay), Jeffrey Nachmanoff (screenplay)
